mapper.select: SELECT * FROM DEPOSIT_AUTO_TRANSFER_TBL WHERE dat_id = #{datId} ORDER BY auto_transfer_id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO DEPOSIT_AUTO_TRANSFER_TBL ( dat_id, from_account, to_account, amount, transfer_type, transfer_day, start_date, end_date, status ) VALUES ( #{datId}, #{fromAccount}, #{toAccount}, #{amount}, #{transferType}, #{transferDay}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{status} )
mapper.update: UPDATE DEPOSIT_AUTO_TRANSFER_TBL SET from_account = #{fromAccount}, to_account = #{toAccount}, amount = #{amount}, transfer_type = #{transferType}, transfer_day = #{transferDay}, start_date = #{startDate}, end_date = #{endDate}, status = #{status} WHERE auto_transfer_id = #{autoTransferId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM DEPOSIT_AUTO_TRANSFER_TBL WHERE transfer_type = 'DAILY' AND status = 'ACTIVE' AND start_date <= #{executionDate} AND (end_date IS NULL OR end_date >= #{executionDate})

SELECT * FROM DEPOSIT_AUTO_TRANSFER_TBL WHERE transfer_type = 'MONTHLY' AND status = 'ACTIVE' AND transfer_day = #{dayOfMonth} AND start_date <= CURRENT_DATE AND (end_date IS NULL OR end_date >= CURRENT_DATE)
